overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City's downtown district. The character navigates from a busy intersection through neon-lit commercial streets and into a narrow alleyway, showcasing the game's dense urban cyberpunk aesthetic with heavy neon signage and futuristic architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy downtown intersection with pedestrian crosswalk

events.description: character steps onto crosswalk and begins crossing the multi-lane street with other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: waiting at the street corner then crossing the road alongside other pedestrians while vehicles pass by

notable_agents.action: futuristic car driving along the road adjacent to the crosswalk
pedestrian in colorful outfit waiting at the corner before crossing

entered.detail: large industrial steam vent emitting white smoke between futuristic buildings
massive concrete and metal overpass structure spanning the street overhead
zebra-striped pedestrian crossing with red and yellow markings
tall futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows and neon signage

segments.scene_description: The character stands at a busy downtown intersection beneath an elevated highway, surrounded by futuristic glass towers. Steam rises from a vent in the distance as the character crosses the street alongside other pedestrians, with vehicles passing on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway beneath elevated highway infrastructure

events.description: character moves from open intersection into the covered area beneath the elevated highway
passing a large steam vent emitting thick white smoke onto the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beneath the overpass, passing concrete pillars and steam vents

entered.detail: massive cylindrical support columns for the elevated highway structure
large illuminated advertisement screen mounted on building facade
dark metal and concrete underside of the highway creating a tunnel-like effect

segments.scene_description: The character walks beneath the massive elevated highway structure, moving through a semi-covered corridor of concrete pillars. Steam from a street vent creates atmospheric haze as the character progresses toward the light at the end of the underpass, with sparse pedestrian traffic and distant vehicles visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial district with heavy neon advertising and storefronts

events.description: exiting the underpass into the open commercial street with dense neon signage
character turns slightly toward a narrow alley entrance with stairs

agents.ego_description: walking along the commercial sidewalk past vending machines and shops, approaching an alleyway

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white jacket and shorts walking toward the camera

entered.detail: massive curved digital screens displaying colorful advertisements spanning across the street
futuristic red and green vending machine with illuminated product display
traditional-style red spherical lanterns hanging outside shop entrances
storefronts with illuminated signs including the Brooklyn Barista coffee shop

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the underpass, the character enters a vibrant commercial district bathed in neon light from massive overhead digital billboards. The street features futuristic vending machines, red paper lanterns, and various shop fronts including a coffee shop, with moderate pedestrian traffic moving in both directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service alley with stairway entrance

events.description: character enters a narrow alleyway and ascends a short flight of stairs
lighting shifts to green-tinted artificial light as character enters the covered corridor

agents.ego_description: walking up stairs into a narrow alley corridor, following another pedestrian

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt leading the way up the stairs into the alley

entered.detail: concrete steps leading upward into a narrow passageway between buildings
narrow passage illuminated by green fluorescent lighting with metal walls
red dumpster and garbage bags against the wall
chain-link metal fence covering windows along the alley wall

segments.scene_description: The character turns into a narrow alleyway and ascends concrete stairs into a service corridor. The environment shifts to green-tinted artificial lighting with metal grating on walls and trash containers visible, creating a claustrophobic atmosphere distinct from the open commercial street.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial alley with digital advertisements

events.description: passing large illuminated advertisement screens for Cirrus Cola on the right wall

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow alley passing other pedestrians and advertisement screens

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue shirt walking toward the camera in the narrow passage

entered.detail: large blue and red digital advertisement for Cirrus Cola covering the right wall
row of illuminated vending machines along the right wall of the alley
multiple digital posters and screens displaying various advertisements

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds through the narrow alley corridor, passing large digital advertisements including a prominent Cirrus Cola billboard. The space remains enclosed with concrete walls and overhead structures, illuminated by artificial lighting from the various screens and vending machines lining the passage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sprawling downtown intersection into the claustrophobic depths of a neon-lit service alley. It begins at a busy crossing beneath an elevated highway, moving past glass towers and rising steam as the character navigates through pedestrian traffic. As the camera follows the character beneath the massive concrete pillars of the underpass, the open city fades into an atmospheric haze before emerging into a vibrant commercial district filled with digital billboards, red lanterns, and futuristic shop fronts. The scene then shifts abruptly as the character turns away from the bright street, ascending concrete stairs into a narrow corridor defined by green-tinted artificial lighting and metal grating. Finally, the movement continues through this enclosed passage, passing trash containers and glowing Cirrus Cola advertisements that illuminate the concrete walls.
